description: Create a 30-frame lip-sync animation in OpenToonz using drawing substitution with the mouth shape sequence from /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/mouth_shapes/ (mouth.0001.png, mouth.0002.png, mouth.0003.png). The animation must feature Drawing 1 on frames 1-10, Drawing 2 on frames 11-20, and Drawing 3 on frames 21-30. Render the sequence as PNG files to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/lipsync/.
